query_text: SEC Form 13F limitations confidential treatment institutional investment managers
notes: SEC FAQ establishes Form 13F scope, reporting threshold, reportable securities and confidential-treatment caveats. Use for institutional-holding context, not real-time intent. https://www.sec.gov/rules-regulations/staff-guidance/division-investment-management-frequently-asked-questions/frequently-asked-questions-about-form-13f

Investor.gov explains Form 4 timing, transaction details, transaction codes and caveat that insider sales can occur for liquidity/diversification. Use to prevent over-reading insider sales. https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins/investor-bulletins-69

query_text: FINRA ATS transparency block-size trade data OTC transparency
notes: FINRA OTC transparency data is derived from OTC trades reported to FINRA facilities and includes ATS/non-ATS transparency references. Useful for observed flow, not pre-trade intent. https://www.finra.org/filing-reporting/otc-transparency

query_text: OCC options volume open interest query
notes: OCC is an official options market-data source and includes risk caveats. Need expiry/strike/quote-time context before inference. https://www.theocc.com/market-data/market-data-reports/volume-and-open-interest/volume-query

query_text: Pan Poteshman information option volume future stock prices
notes: Pan and Poteshman find buyer-initiated opening option volume contains information, but key signed/opening data is not generally public. Use to justify possibility, not simple UOA alerts. https://www.nber.org/papers/w10925

query_text: order imbalance individual stock returns market microstructure
notes: Order imbalance literature supports price-flow relation but includes bid-ask bounce and contemporaneous-return contamination caveats. https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0304405X03001752

query_text: options earnings announcements volume open interest liquidity
notes: Donders/Kouwenberg/Vorst show options IV volume OI and spreads change around earnings, supporting event-window context rather than directional proof. https://ideas.repec.org/a/bla/eufman/v6y2000i2p149-171.html

query_text: options volume as noise earnings announcements retail zero commission
notes: Recent contradiction seed argues high option-to-stock volume may predict lower returns around earnings, highlighting retail/noise and regime risks. Needs verification before high weight. https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/Delivery.cfm/6448100.pdf?abstractid=6448100&mirid=1

query_text: repo search technical-market-pricing-context market-structure-policy overlay-routing options positioning
notes: Existing Mira methods cover market-pricing context and structural price setters but lack a dedicated counterparty-intent hypothesis workflow. New method should be overlay only.
